introSection: Wild West Express is a steel roller coaster located at Adventure Park USA in New Market, Maryland, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Windstorm opened at Old Town in Kissimmee, Florida, USA on February 15, 1997. It closed in 2014.

The ride reopened at Adventure Park USA in 2015 as Wild West Express.

The ride was listed for sale on UsedRides.com on March 1, 2024 with an asking price of $450,000.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ride page on Adventure Park USA's website

fullText:
Wild West Express is a steel roller coaster located at Adventure Park USA in New Market, Maryland, USA.

Windstorm opened at Old Town in Kissimmee, Florida, USA on February 15, 1997. It closed in 2014.

The ride reopened at Adventure Park USA in 2015 as Wild West Express.

The ride was listed for sale on UsedRides.com on March 1, 2024 with an asking price of $450,000.






 * Ride page on Adventure Park USA's website
